verification.details: bun typecheck reports 107 errors (0 in modified/created .pg.sql.ts files). No pg.sql.ts file imports from drizzle-orm/sqlite-core. No pg.sql.ts file uses sqliteTable. All files use pgTable() from drizzle-orm/pg-core. All 16 tables are exported across 9 files.

lessons: Integer timestamps via integer() from pg-core are API-compatible with SQLite integer() — the existing .sql.ts files continue to work when they spread TimestampsPg from schema.pg.sql.ts even after switching to pg-core imports.
The event/event.sql.ts and share/share.sql.ts already import TimestampsPg from storage/schema.pg.sql — a transitional pattern from the migration that persists during this phase.
jsonb() in pg-core is the direct replacement for text({mode:'json'}) in sqlite-core — same API for $type generics and notNull/default chains.
summary: Completed Phase 1.2 of the Postgres Migration — rewrote all stub .pg.sql.ts files with real pgTable() definitions from drizzle-orm/pg-core. Fixed schema.pg.sql.ts to import from pg-core. Created 3 missing .pg.sql.ts files. All 9 files and 16 tables pass typecheck with zero new errors. The PG schema layer now provides proper Postgres-native column types (jsonb, boolean, pgTable) while maintaining API compatibility with the existing SQLite files.
